description_long: This is a vintage porcelain doll dressed in an elaborate, off-white Victorian-style gown with puffed sleeves and a high neckline. The doll features long, wavy, light brown hair that cascades down her back and is partially covered by a large, ornate straw hat adorned with fabric flowers and ribbons. Her face is delicately painted with a pale complexion, rosy cheeks, and glassy eyes, giving her a lifelike yet slightly somber expression. The hands and face appear to be made of porcelain, while the body is likely cloth or composite material, allowing for some flexibility. The dress is detailed with gathered fabric and subtle ruffles, and the hat's wide brim adds a dramatic flair. This doll would be a striking, nostalgic object if found in an urban park, on a stoop, or in a window display.
description: A vintage porcelain doll in a Victorian-style white dress with a large, decorated straw hat and long, wavy brown hair. The doll has a delicately painted face and detailed period clothing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, detailed dress, and the full brim of the ornate straw hat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, the cascading hair, and the side of the dress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hat, the full length of the wavy hair, and the gathered fabric of the dress.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile of the hat, the hair, and the side of the dress with visible hand.
attribute_clothing_style: Victorian-inspired full-length white dress with puffed sleeves, high neckline, gathered skirt, and a large, wide-brimmed straw hat decorated with fabric flowers and ribbons.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hands relaxed at the sides; head facing forward, legs together, and torso straight.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed mouth, wide glassy eyes, and delicately painted features conveying a calm demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, wavy light brown hair extending down the back, partially covered by the hat.
